characters.name: Bev Keane
characters.description: Bev KeaneBiographical InformationStatusDeceasedOccupationSchool administratorCause of DeathCombustionRelationshipsAffiliationSt. Patrick's Catholic ChurchAppearancesActorSamantha SloyanFirst AppearanceBook I: GenesisLast AppearanceBook VII: Revelation[Source] Beverly "Bev" Keaneis the main antagonist of theNetflixoriginal horror seriesMidnight Mass. She is portrayed bySamantha Sloyan. Bev is aCrockett Islandlocal. She is a self-serving religious zealot. Bev rules the community as administrator with puritanical judgement, often abusing scripture to fit her needs.

characters.name: Ooker
characters.description: OokerBiographical InformationStatusDeceasedOccupationStudentAltar boyCause of DeathCombustionRelationshipsAffiliationSt. Patrick's Catholic ChurchRelativesUnnamed mother †Unnamed fatherBobby(brother)AppearancesActorLouis MoffatFirst AppearanceBook I: GenesisLast AppearanceBook VII: Revelation[Source] Ookeris a character on theNetflixoriginal horror seriesMidnight Mass. He is portrayed byLouis Moffat. Ooker is an altar boy atSt. Patrick's Catholic ChurchandWarren's friend. He andWarrenwould smoke and drink at the Uppards at night. He didn't wantAlito tag along with him and Warren, because he thought Ali would snitch to his dad, thesheriff.He was tellingAliabout how people used to live at the Uppards until the 20's. He said that they brought cats and that's why there are so many.
